error.genericBody: Try again in a moment. If it keeps happening, reach out to ops.
error.permission: You do not have permission to perform this action.
error.session: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
error.network: Unable to reach the server. Please check your connection and try again.
error.timeout: The request took too long. Please try again.
error.validation: The value you entered is not valid. Please check and try again.
error.duplicate: This record already exists. Please check for duplicates.
error.tooLong: The text you entered is too long. Please shorten it and try again.
error.format: The value you entered is not in the correct format.

emptyState.profileUnavailableBody: No profile is linked to this account yet.
emptyState.profileSetupRequiredBody: Your account is authenticated, but no profile record was found yet.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyMessage: All caught up. No new notifications.

scheduling.pageDescription: Build, publish, and manage team shift schedules.
scheduling.pilotBanner: Scheduling is in limited pilot for Customer Success. Create monthly schedules for your team in a few clicks.
scheduling.profileUnavailableBody: No profile is linked to this account yet.
scheduling.accessDeniedBody: Scheduling is available for Customer Success crew. If you believe you should have access, contact your manager.

track.weekdayDescription: Monday through Friday shifts for the team.

wizard.noScheduleId: Schedule creation did not return an ID
wizard.warningUnfilledShifts: {count} day(s) have unfilled shifts due to limited availability.

roster.noSearchResults: No team members match your search.

cardGrid.emptyDescription: Create your first monthly schedule in a few clicks.

manage.title: Schedules
manage.description: Create and manage monthly schedules for your team.
manage.confirmPublishBody: Publishing will notify all assigned team members. This action cannot be undone.
manage.confirmDeleteBody: This will permanently delete this schedule and all linked shifts.

calendar.noShiftsDescription: Create and publish a schedule to see the team calendar.
calendar.noPublishedTitle: No published shifts in this schedule
calendar.noPublishedDescription: Publish shifts from Manage before reviewing the team calendar.
calendar.dragHelper: Drag and drop any shift to a new day to reschedule it.

overview.swapRequestedDesc: Your shifts in swap request status.
overview.quickActionsDesc: Review your swap requests and team calendar.
overview.myScheduleDesc: Click on a shift to request a swap.
overview.noShiftsDesc: Your upcoming shifts will appear after a schedule is published.
overview.swapRequestsDesc: Request, track, and resolve shift swaps directly from My Schedule.

swapModal.title: Request swap
swapModal.scopeLabel: What do you want to swap?
swapModal.reasonPlaceholder: Why do you need to swap?

openShifts.pageDescription: Claim available shifts published by your managers.
openShifts.emptyDescription: When managers publish open shifts, they appear here.

swaps.pageDescription: Request, review, and resolve shift swap requests.
swaps.requestDescription: Select one of your upcoming shifts and optionally add context.
swaps.reasonPlaceholder: Need coverage for a client meeting.
swaps.validationSelectShift: Select a shift to request a swap.
swaps.emptyDescription: Your submitted and received swap requests will appear here.
swaps.assignDescription: Select who should cover {requesterName}'s shift on {shiftDate}.
swaps.leaveConflictWarning: Selected crew member is on approved leave for this shift date. Proceed anyway?
swaps.leaveConflictBody: Proceeding will still assign the shift. Choose No to pick another crew member.
swaps.validationSelectMember: Select a crew member before approving.
swaps.confirmCancelBody: The swap request will be cancelled and the shift will return to its original state.
swaps.confirmRejectBody: The swap request will be rejected.

profile.heading: Profile

organization.heading: Organization
organization.orgDescription: Update your organization name. This is displayed across Crew Hub.
organization.restrictedBody: Only a Super Admin can edit the organization name.

security.heading: Security
security.securityDescription: Your account is secured with an authenticator app.
security.enrolledDescription: Your authenticator app is your login credential. You use it to generate a 6-digit code every time you sign in.
security.notEnrolledDescription: Your authenticator has not been set up yet. You will be prompted to set it up the next time you sign in.
security.resetContact: Need to reset your authenticator? Contact your admin.
security.supportDescription: Found a bug or need help? Ping Zino or Eniibukun on Basecamp.

audit.restrictedBody: Only HR Admin and Super Admin can view audit history.

payrollPage.accessDenied: Only HR Admin, Finance Admin, and Super Admin can view payroll runs.

payrollPage.settingsDescription: Manage statutory withholding rollout and deduction configuration.
payrollPage.settingsCountryDescription: Configure country-by-country statutory withholding in Crew Hub.

approvalsPage.accessDeniedBody: Only team leads, managers, and admins can process approvals.

analyticsPage.accessDenied: Only HR Admin, Finance Admin, and Super Admin can access analytics.

performancePage.adminDescription: Run review cycles, track completion, and calibrate fairly.

accessControl.accessDeniedBody: Only Super Admin can update navigation and dashboard visibility rules.

onboardingPage.accessDenied: Onboarding dashboard is limited to managers and admins
onboardingPage.accessDeniedBody: Open your personal onboarding page to view your assigned tasks.

learningPage.courseCreationRestrictedBody: Only HR Admin and Super Admin can create learning courses.

learningPage.adminRestrictedBody: Only HR Admin and Super Admin can manage learning courses.

support.title: Help & Support
support.description: How to get help, report bugs, and find answers.
support.reportBugBody: Spotted something broken or not working right? Ping Zino or Eniibukun on Basecamp and we'll get it sorted.
support.featureQuestionsBody: Some features are marked Pilot, Coming Soon, or Preview. These labels show the current availability status. Ask your manager or admin if you have questions about what's available.
support.accountAccessBody: Need a password reset, role change, or help with access issues? Reach out to Operations directly.
support.dataPrivacyBody: For data export requests, account deletion, or privacy questions, see our
